data.title: Comcast Technology Solutions Selected by Altibox for Centralized Video Management Across Norway and Denmark
data.description: CTS has introduced its Cloud Video Platform to offer back-end video management and publishing services for Altibox TV on set-top boxes and connected devices. The deployment aims to enhance operations and ensure the efficient delivery of premium on-demand content from various TV and streaming services to subscribers in Scandinavia. This initiative in Denver will benefit subscribers and improve their viewing experience.

data.title: SuperAI 2026 Returns to Singapore as the World's AI Powers Converge on Neutral Ground
data.description: The biggest artificial intelligence (AI) conference in Asia will be taking place at Marina Bay Sands in Singapore on June 10-11, attracting over 10,000 participants. The event has already secured the participation of tech giants like Google, AWS, Arm, Red Hat, and Snowflake. This gathering aims to bring together industry leaders, innovators, and AI enthusiasts to share insights and discuss the latest trends in AI technology.

data.title: Moving average interaction systematized for trading decisions; 2 buy & sell points derived, reducing risk to operable scenarios.
data.description: The article discusses the shift from analyzing moving averages for interaction classification to making actionable trading decisions. It introduces a comprehensive classification-response system that reduces market risk to a limited number of manageable scenarios. In a dual moving average setup, it identifies two ideal buy points and two symmetric sell points, creating a fully operational trading cycle. The system aims to streamline the process and facilitate strategic decision-making in trading.

data.title: Circle introduces gas-free USDC cross-chain transfers via Gateway Integration, connecting 8+ chains with developer tools.
data.description: Circle has introduced a new developer toolkit that integrates Gateway, Gas Station, and Forwarding Service in order to facilitate USDC transfers across more than 8 blockchain networks without requiring native gas tokens for transactions. This toolkit streamlines the process of transferring USDC across different chains and provides developers with a comprehensive solution for seamless multi-chain transactions.

data.title: SAFE Structure Designs Transitions Patented SAFE MULE Expeditionary Logistics Platform into Production for U.S. Military Operations
data.description: Introducing the SAFE MULE Capability Snapshot System – an innovative solution designed for expeditionary logistics, equipment transport, and rapid material handling in challenging conditions. This system, known as the Multi-Function Utility Loader – Expeditionary (SAFE MULE), is utilized by the U.S. Navy, Marine Corps, and U.S. Air Force. It offers essential support in austere environments, aiding in various missions. Designed to enhance expeditionary operations, this system is tailored to meet the needs of forward operating environments, ensuring efficiency and effectiveness for users.

data.title: Anaergia Reports Positive Adjusted EBITDA1 and Strong Revenue Growth in Fiscal 2025
data.description: Anaergia, based in Burlington, Ontario, has announced its financial results for fiscal year 2025. The company reported a significant increase in Adjusted EBITDA, with a notable growth of 61% in revenue. Additionally, their Revenue Backlog has surged by 149%. Anaergia's performance on the TSX (ANRG) and OTCQX (ANRGF) has been positive, reflecting their strong financial standing and growth in the market.

data.title: Members Have Spoken: Notre Dame FCU and Catholic United Financial CU Set to Merge April 1st
data.description: Notre Dame Federal Credit Union and Catholic United Financial Credit Union announced on March 25, 2026, their decision to proceed with the planned merger after receiving significant support from members. This merger signifies a pivotal move in uniting the two organizations, both dedicated to their mission-driven financial services.

data.title: GAC Philippines Lands Three Strategic Moves with ONE GAC 2.0 to Deepen Local Market Presence
data.description: In March 25, 2026, in Manila, the Philippines, GAC saw significant growth in the Asia-Pacific area in early 2026. From late January, GAC INTERNATIONAL Philippines concentrated on a "brand renewal" strategy, successfully implementing various aspects such as strategy announcement and rollout.

data.title: Bitcoin Depot appoints ex-MoneyGram CEO Alex Holmes amidst increased state regulations for crypto ATMs in the US.
data.description: Alex Holmes, a former MoneyGram executive, has taken the helm at Bitcoin Depot as the company navigates increasing legal challenges in numerous states across the US. With over 15,000 Bitcoin ATMs operating nationwide, the crypto ATM industry is under heightened scrutiny. Holmes' appointment comes amidst mounting regulatory pressure on the sector, as authorities investigate compliance and consumer protection issues. This leadership change follows a period of rapid growth for Bitcoin Depot, which has seen a 180% increase in its number of ATMs in the past year.

data.title: Court denies developer's attempt to exempt software from money transmitter laws. Michael Lewellen considers next steps after Texas judge's ruling.
data.description: Michael Lewellen, the developer of Pharos, stated that his legal team is considering all possibilities after a judge in Texas dismissed the case without prejudice.

data.title: While Private Equity Firms Abandon Homeowners Overnight, Evolve Construction Is Planting Roots in Kansas and Missouri
data.description: A construction company known as Evolve Construction, operating in over 35 markets within the United States, has obtained certifications from HAAG and IICRC. They offer services backed by proprietary artificial intelligence technology and ensure 100% customer satisfaction with a guarantee.

data.title: Powering global maritime decarbonization, Shanghai Electric delivers first large-scale biomethanol bunkering for international shipping
data.description: In March 2026, Shanghai Electric's Taonan project achieved a significant milestone by bunkering biomethanol onto the container vessel CMA CGM OSMIUM at Shanghai's Yangshan Port. This marks the pioneering use of Chinese biomethanol on a large scale.

data.title: Hydrogen Energy Storage Market to Reach USD 22,061.66 Million by 2032, Driven by Renewable Integration and Industrial Decarbonization - Credence Research
data.description: In London on March 25, 2026, a new report titled "Hydrogen Energy Storage Market – Growth, Share, Opportunities & Competitive Analysis, 2025–2032" has been included in the Credence Research database. The report focuses on the global Hydrogen Energy Storage Market, which had a value of USD 15,363.89 million.

data.title: Brookfield Wealth Solutions Completes Annual Filings
data.description: Brookfield Wealth Solutions Ltd. (NYSE: BNT) shared their 2025 annual report on March 25, 2026, which includes audited financial statements for the year concluding on December 31, 2025. This annual report has been filed on Form 20-F with the SEC on EDGAR and also with Canadian securities regulatory authorities on SEDAR+.

data.title: CCTV+: Blossoming cherry trees draw tourists from far and wide to east China city
data.description: On March 25, 2026, the Zhongxi Cherry Blossom Cultural Tourism Season began in Pinghu City, Zhejiang Province, China. The event, held at Zhongxi Sakura Alley, spans three days and showcases tens of thousands of cherry trees in bloom. The colorful blossoms provide a breathtaking backdrop for visitors, attracting a significant number of tourists to the region.

data.title: Coast to Coast! Dickey’s Barbecue Pit Solidifies Major Restaurant Deals in Q1 to Bring Legit. Texas. Barbecue. to New Communities Across the U.S.
data.description: In the first quarter of this year, Dickey’s Barbecue Pit has successfully secured significant restaurant deals, expanding its presence across the United States. The renowned barbecue chain has finalized agreements to bring authentic Texas barbecue to several new communities nationwide.

data.title: Stack Capital Group Inc. Announces Upsize to Its Previously Announced Best Efforts Financing for Up to $30,000,000
data.description: This information is not intended for distribution through United States news wire services or for dissemination within the United States.
Dave McCormick has recently revealed his latest stock transactions.
Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Hold Steady Amid US-Iran Truce Momentum: Here's Why This Analyst Thinks Now Is A 'Great Time To Buy' BTC

data.title: SCIENTOLOGY NETWORK CELEBRATES INTERNATIONAL DAY OF HAPPINESS WITH GLOBAL MARATHON
data.description: On March 25, 2026, in Los Angeles, the Scientology Network participated in the observance of the United Nations International Day of Happiness by hosting a special television marathon featuring The Way to Happiness and its extensive worldwide influence. Since its inception in 2013, this day emphasizes the significant importance of happiness. The event included a showcase of the global impact of The Way to Happiness, spreading a message of positivity to a large audience.
